title: Intensely Roasted Middle Eastern Ground Oats Muhammara
description: A buttery and silky quick-fix Middle Eastern dish featuring ground oats, roast, and low-calorie-friendly ingredients in a muhammara form, cooked in a wok. This recipe is perfect for a healthy and flavorful snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: ground oats
ingredients.notes: rolled or instant oats work too

instructions: Heat the butter in a large wok over medium heat until melted and fragrant.
Add the ground oats to the wok and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes or until lightly toasted.
Add the roasted red peppers, roasted garlic, pomegranate molasses, sumac, salt, and black pepper to the wok and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the mixture is heated through and the flavors are well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the muhammara to a serving bowl and garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
